name: Dieter's Mock Choc. Truffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs with water, rum, and orange juice concentrate until thick and lemon-colored (5-7 minutes).
2. Gradually add the Equal packets.
3. Fold in the cocoa powder and bread crumbs. The mixture will become very dense.
4. Shape rounded teaspoons of the mixture into balls.
5. Let the truffles stand at room temperature until the outside is dry.
6. Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator (approximately 73 calories per serving, or about 3 truffles).
